description: Evaluates security architecture management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, network and application segmentation, encryption, network resiliency, design reviews, secure API communications, network security controls, cloud migration, and architecture management office (AMO) operations.

capabilities.name: Architecture management service
capabilities.description: A security architecture management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise architecture management service exists
Frequent service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Architecture management KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for architecture management
Frequent KPI/KRI review

capabilities.name: Network Segmentation based on least function principle
capabilities.description: Network segmentation follows a documented strategy or industry standards, is deployed enterprise-wide, supports automation, is reviewed frequently, and physically separates staging, development, and deployment segments.
evaluation_focus: Segmentation strategy or industry standards
Enterprise-wide network segmentation deployment
Automated or manual segmentation by functional requirement
Frequent segmentation review for security enhancement
Physical separation of staging, development, and deployment segments

capabilities.name: Applications isolation
capabilities.description: Application segmentation follows a documented strategy or industry standards, is deployed enterprise-wide, supports automation, and is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Application segmentation strategy or industry standards
Enterprise-wide application segmentation deployment
Automated or manual application segmentation by functional requirement
Frequent application segmentation review for security enhancement

capabilities.name: Network Encryption
capabilities.description: The enterprise encrypts data in motion between segments enterprise-wide and maintains cryptographic agility.
evaluation_focus: Data in motion encryption enterprise-wide
Cryptographic agility

capabilities.name: Network Assurance — Resiliency
capabilities.description: Network architecture provides active/active resiliency across availability zones, alternate paths for workloads, and single point of failure analysis.
evaluation_focus: Active/active network across availability zones
At least two availability zones
Alternate path failover for workloads
Single point of failure analysis

capabilities.name: Design Reviews
capabilities.description: A formalized, documented process governs security architecture design reviews.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented design review process

capabilities.name: Secure internal API communications
capabilities.description: Technology and deployment practices support secure API communications across functional segments, with monitoring and review.
evaluation_focus: Technology supporting secure API communications
Secure communications across functional segments and applications
Monitoring and review of inter-application communications

capabilities.name: Network Security
capabilities.description: Function-based network security controls are deployed across enterprise functional segments and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Function-based network security controls across segments
Frequent network security control efficacy review

capabilities.name: Cloud Adoption and Migration
capabilities.description: The enterprise can securely migrate workloads from on-premises to cloud segments across all locations, with automation and frequent process review.
evaluation_focus: Secure on-premises to cloud workload migration
Cloud migration across all enterprise locations
Automated cloud migration from on-premises segments
Frequent cloud migration process review

capabilities.name: AMO team
capabilities.description: A dedicated architecture management office team tracks architectural changes, measures threat risk, and reviews relevant architectural upgrades.
evaluation_focus: Dedicated AMO team for architectural change management
Threat risk measurement and architectural upgrade review

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
